content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach deploys multiple AoA signature moves at precisely the right moments: refusing to issue a verdict on 'selfish' (turn 2), pivoting to the want underneath ('what is it you actually want?'), letting the want be described concretely (turn 4: 'what's the mountain like?'), naming the linguistic-caveat read ('a lot of energy spent at the gate'), the signature 'what are you scared would happen?' question (turn 8) deployed exactly when fear is live, surfacing childhood-imprinting (turn 10: 'where did you learn...'), embodied check-in (turn 12: 'what do you notice in your body'), and finally trusting-the-want over the should (turn 14). No anti-AoA frames, no CBT reframing, no jumping to compassion or partner-empathy before the want is felt. Methodology serves the moment throughout.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the verdict frame and pivots to the want — textbook find-the-want-behind-the-should."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the linguistic-caveat ('energy spent at the gate') and invites concrete description of the want."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the somatic/tonal shift — feel-over-figure in action."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'what are you scared would happen?' question deployed at the right moment."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the avoidance function of the 'selfish' question and opens childhood-imprinting inquiry."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Body-based check-in after insight — classic AoA somatic anchoring."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names want-vs-should distinction and trusts the want."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "The exact 'what if you acted exactly how you want' question wasn't used verbatim, but the equivalent move (trust the want) was executed in turn 14. Anti-patterns (spiritual-narcissism, jumping to compassion) were avoided."
}
